name: Cranberry Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the jelly into three round slices, each 1/2 inch thick.
2. Slice each round into strips measuring approximately 1/2 x 1/2 x 2-1/2 inches.
3. Prepare a batter by mixing flour, baking powder, sugar, and water.
4. Heat oil for deep-frying until hot; maintain medium-high heat.
5. Dredge jelly strips in flour, ensuring all sides are dusted.
6. Dip the dredged strips into the batter to coat completely.
7. Fry the coated strips in batches until golden brown.
8. Drain on paper towels and serve while hot.
This recipe yields three to four small servings.
